svg.text: app.py — Vectorless Multimodal RAG · System Architecture
FastAPI · LangChain · Google Gemini · PyMuPDF · No vectors · No chunking · No OCR
fetch() API calls · Vanilla JS · Light-themed SPA
— non-blocking: CPU-heavy tasks run in threads
⚠ HTTPException 400 (bad input · file too large) · 500 (Gemini / processing error) · Max upload 50 MB
vectorless_rag/pipeline.py · global singleton · shared by all requests
• LLM reads tree index (no body text)
Model: gemini-3-flash-preview (configurable via GEMINI_MODEL env var)
• Tree build: first 50 pages (≤100k chars) → hierarchical JSON (SystemMessage + HumanMessage)
• Text RAG: multi-turn conversation loop (SystemMessage / HumanMessage / AIMessage)
• Vision RAG: image_url blocks (data:image/jpeg;base64,...) — no OCR, purely visual
